name: Northcrest Golf Driving Range, Pro Shop & Simulator indoor Golf
about:
Northcrest Golf Driving Range, Pro Shop & Simulator Indoor Golf serves as a comprehensive golf destination in Atlanta, offering a blend of outdoor practice facilities and indoor simulation. The facility features 125 hitting bays equipped with stadium lighting for evening use, providing golfers with extensive practice opportunities regardless of the time of day. With options for both premium turf mats and grass tee areas, the venue caters to diverse training preferences. 

Beyond the driving range, Northcrest houses a well-appointed Pro Shop carrying major equipment brands such as TaylorMade, Callaway, and XXIO, along with repair services. The inclusion of Golfzon simulators adds a year-round entertainment dimension, allowing guests to play iconic courses indoors. The venue actively hosts corporate events and youth group outings, positioning itself as a versatile space for both individual practice and group gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: 125 practice bays with stadium lighting for late-night sessions
Diverse practice options including grass tees and premium turf mats
State-of-the-art Golfzon simulators for year-round play
Fully stocked Pro Shop with premium brands and club repair services
Weather-protected ground-level bays for practice in rain or shine

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulators available for year-round play.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The venue has a Pro Shop on-site where you can purchase equipment, and rentals are likely available, though specific rental policies for the range/simulators are not detailed.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: Information regarding outside food and beverage policies is not provided on the website.

faq.question: How long does 18 holes take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the expected duration for an 18-hole round on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Northcrest hosts school and youth group events and offers lesson packages, making it suitable for juniors.
